title: Yearly Training Calendar

posts.author: Soko (Soko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team

is there any chance we can create a Yearly training calendar on monday.com?

I understand there is a calendar feature however it does not show the calendar view as yearly only monthly, weekly or daily. It would be great to see as yearly and able to print out.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Soko !

Unfortunately you are correct that the calendar view, can only be set in days, weeks and months.

Your options are creating a calendar widget filtered to each month of the year, or trying to see if perhaps you can use a Gantt chart in your use case, since the Gantt chart does support yearly views.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Claudia413 (Claudia E)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Soko,

If you’re still looking for a solution for this I can recommend Calendar Plus in the marketplace. It’s a free calendar app that has a year overview that allows you to see the whole year and scheduled tasks in each month.

https://monday.com/marketplace/10000475

This is what it looks like:

CalendarPlusYearView2237×1672 247 KB

At this point it’s not yet optimized for printing so that would look a bit odd probably.

I hope this helps you with your planning. I helped build this app and we’d love to hear it if you have any feature requests (apart from printing, I’ve noted that one ). We regularly build features people have requested.

posts.author: Soko (Soko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Claudia

Thanks for reviewing this and sending me an email. This is perfect for now, appreciate your help,

image005.png1210×303 449 KB
